subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Though the upheaval in Persia is severe and trials and tribulations have overtaken all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء هر چند انقلاب ایران شدید است و محن و بلایا مستولی بر هر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort, @poems and quotation from poetry, @non-participation in politics
